set_fields.description: Wire forge into tau extension lifecycle.nn## app.ts integrationn- Import initForge from src/forge/index.tsn- Call initForge(pi) in runTau setup sequencen- No Effect service needed (forge is self-contained like ralph)nn## Session eventsn- session_start: check for active forges, notify user, restore tool activationn- session_shutdown: save active forge staten- session_switch: if new session, check if it was created by forge (for fresh implement sessions)nn## New session for implement cyclesn- On forge_review(reject): use ctx.newSession() to create fresh sessionn- After new session created: inject implement prompt via pi.sendUserMessage()n- Store parent session reference if needed for navigationnn## UIn- setStatus('forge', ...) when active — show task ID and cyclen- setWidget('forge', ...) when active — show phase, cycle, task summaryn- Clear on forge completion/pausenn## DoDn- Forge survives session restartsn- Fresh sessions created on rejectn- Status bar shows forge staten- No interference with ralph (both can coexist)
